summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SEO meta tags, Profile API, and Profile Page features. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). All 5 frontend test scenarios passed (100%). New features working correctly: SEO fixes (title 52 chars, canonical with trailing slash, og:image, hreflang, Substack in JSON-LD), Profile editing (avatar color, travel style, interests, bio), Footer Substack icon, Navbar user menu with Edit Profile link.
passed_tests: SEO TESTS (Backend):
✓ Title length is 52 characters (within 50-60 optimal range)
✓ Canonical URL has trailing slash: https://forgot-password-flow-5.preview.emergentagent.com/
✓ og:image points to actual image URL (customer-assets.emergentagent.com)
✓ hreflang tags present (en, fr, ar, x-default)
✓ Keywords include brand variations (marocsphere, moroccosphere, maroc sphere)
✓ JSON-LD sameAs includes Substack link (marocsphere.substack.com)
✓ JSON-LD alternateName includes brand variations
PROFILE API TESTS (Backend):
✓ GET /api/auth/me returns user profile with all fields
✓ PUT /api/auth/profile updates phone number
✓ PUT /api/auth/profile updates bio
✓ PUT /api/auth/profile updates travel_style
✓ PUT /api/auth/profile updates interests array
✓ PUT /api/auth/profile updates avatar_color
✓ PUT /api/auth/profile returns new token when name changes
✓ PUT /api/auth/profile with no fields returns 400
✓ PUT /api/auth/profile without token returns 401
FOOTER TESTS (Frontend):
✓ Substack icon appears in footer social links
✓ All 6 social links present (Facebook, Instagram, X, LinkedIn, YouTube, Substack)
NAVBAR TESTS (Frontend):
✓ User menu toggle visible when logged in
✓ User dropdown shows: Dashboard, Edit Profile, My Trips, Subscription, Sign Out
✓ Sign Out clears localStorage and shows Sign In button
PROFILE PAGE TESTS (Frontend):
✓ Profile page loads with current user data pre-populated
✓ Name input field present and editable
✓ Phone input field present and editable
✓ Bio textarea present with character counter (X/200)
✓ Language selector present with 5 options
✓ Avatar color picker works (10 colors)
✓ Travel style selector works (6 options: Adventure, Cultural, Relaxation, Foodie, Photography, Budget)
✓ Interest tags toggle on/off (12 interests)
✓ Save Profile button works and shows success toast
✓ Back to Dashboard link navigates correctly
DASHBOARD TESTS (Frontend):
✓ Edit Profile button on dashboard navigates to /profile
critical_code_review_comments: All SEO meta tags properly implemented in index.html
Profile API correctly handles all field updates with proper validation
Token refresh on name change working as expected
Profile page properly pre-populates data from /api/auth/me
localStorage correctly updated after profile save
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 6 tested new features: SEO meta tags, Profile API (PUT /api/auth/profile), Profile Page (/profile), Footer Substack icon, Navbar Edit Profile link. All features working correctly. Profile page has 10 avatar colors, 6 travel styles, 12 interests. Test user phase1test@example.com has profile data: name='Test Explorer', travel_style='adventure', avatar_color='#E2725B'. Previous iterations (1-5) tested base API routes, admin, reviews, dashboard - all passing.
